[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A screenshot shows a dark mobile interface with a message input preview and a context menu with several action options.

A main focus is the rectangular pop-up menu occupying the lower half of the screen, with multiple lines of options separated by thin horizontal dividers. Above it, there is a chat-style message bubble on the left with visible emoji icons and a short line of text.

Setting:
The image appears to be taken from a mobile messaging app or chat interface, shown in portrait orientation with a dark background and soft, out-of-focus lights in the top area.

Visual Details:
The top portion of the screen is mostly dark and blurred, with three faint light blobs against the background. Along the very top edge are typical status indicators: an airplane icon at the upper left, a Wi-Fi-like signal icon near the left, the time “23.20” centered at the top, and battery/charging indicators on the upper right showing “70%”. Near the lower middle area is a horizontal row of circular emoji icons inside a pill-shaped bar, showing several faces and hearts, followed by a “+” at the right. Below the emoji bar, a message bubble contains text and is accompanied by “23.20” shown in the bubble area. The context menu below has a dark gray/black background, with white text and small white icons to the right of some lines. The last menu item “Hapus” is highlighted in red with a red trash bin icon. The menu options visible are arranged vertically with spacing and separators, and the text is left-aligned while the icons are toward the right.

Visible Text:
23.20
70%
beli mangga lupa di iris miris😂
Beri Bintang
Balas
Teruskan
Salin
Hapus
Lainnya...

Practical Summary:
The image is a dark mobile chat screen with an emoji picker row and a message text bubble. It also shows a menu of reply and message actions, including options like starring, replying, forwarding, copying, and deleting.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
